overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a vibrant alpine meadow. The character walks through dense coniferous forests and open grasslands with colorful wildflowers, approaching snow-capped mountains and distant castle ruins under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coniferous forest edge with wildflower undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall pine trees and patches of purple wildflowers

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees with thick trunks surrounding the path
dense clusters of magenta and purple flowers covering the forest floor
majestic snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense coniferous forest with tall pine trees and vibrant purple wildflowers covering the ground. The character walks steadily forward on grassy terrain, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance through gaps in the tree cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: open alpine meadow with panoramic mountain backdrop

events.description: exits the tree cover into an open meadow revealing the full mountain panorama

agents.ego_description: jogging through open grassland with yellow wildflowers, heading toward the distant peaks

entered.detail: bright yellow flowers dotting the green meadow grass
scattered gray boulders and rock formations in the meadow

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the forest, the scene opens into a wide alpine meadow filled with yellow wildflowers. The snow-capped mountains dominate the center of the view, appearing closer and more detailed as the character moves through the open grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream valley with misty mountain atmosphere

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky in front of the mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating rocky terrain near a stream, with mountains looming ahead

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the mountain sky

entered.detail: narrow waterway with rocky banks winding through the valley
large moss-covered boulders scattered across the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes rockier as the character approaches a mountain stream. Large boulders dot the landscape, and a flock of birds flies across the misty mountains in the background. The vegetation becomes sparser in this valley floor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with distant castle ruins

events.description: ancient stone castle ruins become visible on the distant hillside

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through mixed wildflowers toward the distant castle structure

entered.detail: ancient stone castle or fortress ruins perched on the hillside
clusters of white flowers mixed with the grass

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending a grassy hillside where ancient castle ruins come into view in the distance. White wildflowers dot the landscape, and the snow-capped mountains now frame the right side of the view as the character approaches the historic stone structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a dense coniferous forest into a vast, open alpine landscape. It begins amidst tall pine trees and purple wildflowers, moving steadily forward as snow-capped mountains peek through the gaps in the canopy. As the character emerges from the woods, the scene opens into a wide meadow of yellow wildflowers where the mountains become more detailed and dominant in the center of the view. The terrain then shifts to a rockier valley floor dotted with large boulders and a mountain stream, while a flock of birds drifts across the misty peaks in the background. Finally, the camera ascends a grassy hillside scattered with white wildflowers, turning toward ancient castle ruins that stand against the framing of the distant snowy summits.
